about.description: A passion for art guided me toward a career as a tattoo artist. Over a 13-year career, I have built a vast portfolio with a wide variety of projects and clients. I have gained experience both in Romania and abroad, participating in various international collaborations and projects. I emphasize detail, composition, and creating tattoos that stand the test of time while faithfully reflecting the idea and personality of each client.
